name: jira-card-skills
description: One-command Jira card workflow for Claude Code — /jira-card creates a single well-formed card from a sentence (sprint/board/due date/points/priority from natural language + per-repo config, asking only when unclear), and also routes to backfill (cards from git commits), implement (pick up backlog & code), browse, setup (auto-discovered config), and list (show every command). No hardcoded instance IDs; ships generic conventions as the default profile.
author: Example Org
